title: taraxacum collarispinulosum
intro: Taraxacum collarispinulosum, also known as the Japanese dandelion or white dandelion, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum collarispinulosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, improve immune function, and exhibit anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
